user.title: Statistics Migration
user.description: INFO: In Phase 1, this integration only migrates the internal Home Assistant SQL data tables. Data in external databases (such as InfluxDB) remain untouched.

data.delete_old: Delete old entities completely from the database after successful migration.
data.influxdb_migrate: Also migrate historical data in InfluxDB (v1).
data.influxdb_only: Only migrate InfluxDB (skip local SQL statistics).

device.title: Device Selection
device.description: Select the target parent Device (new device) whose entities you want to migrate.

device_map.title: Entity Mapping
device_map.description: Map each new entity of the device to its corresponding old entity (source). Leave empty if a specific entity should not be migrated.

loop.title: Manual Migration
loop.description: Map an old entity to a new entity.

data.confirm: Yes, I want to proceed with the migration despite the warnings.

influxdb.title: InfluxDB Configuration
influxdb.description: Enter the connection details for your InfluxDB v1 instance to migrate history points.

cleanup_influxdb.title: InfluxDB Configuration (Cleanup)
cleanup_influxdb.description: Enter the connection details for your InfluxDB v1 instance to scan for orphaned or excluded data.

cleanup_select.title: Cleanup Options
cleanup_select.description: Select which cleanup strategy should be used to scan InfluxDB.

cleanup_confirm.title: Select Entities to Delete
cleanup_confirm.description: Select the entities whose historical data you want to permanently delete from InfluxDB.

error.db_error: Database error occurred during migration. Rollback executed.
error.same_entity: Old and new entity must not be identical.
error.no_statistics: The selected old entity does not have long-term statistics.
error.no_device_entities: No entities found for this device.
error.unit_mismatch: The physical units of the entities do not match. Please ensure both entities use the same unit (e.g. Wh or kWh).
error.not_confirmed: You must check the confirmation box to proceed.
error.influx_conn_error: Connection to InfluxDB failed. Please verify host, port, and credentials.
error.no_cleanup_candidates: No cleanup candidate entities found in InfluxDB.
error.no_entities_selected: You must select at least one entity to delete.

init.title: Retry InfluxDB Migration
init.description: Here you can run the InfluxDB migration again for this entry or modify settings.
